ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "magnification" TEXT /* Magnification range of the product */,
  "objective_lens" TEXT /* Objective lens size of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "reticle_type" TEXT /* Type of reticle (e.g., duplex, mil-dot) */,
  "field_of_view" TEXT /* Field of view at 100 yards */,
  "eye_relief" TEXT /* Eye relief distance */,
  "adjustment_per_click" TEXT /* Adjustment per click for windage and elevation */,
  "exit_pupil" TEXT /* Exit pupil size */,
  "coated_lenses" TEXT /* Type of lens coating (e.g., multi-coated, fully multi-coated) */,
  "waterproof" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is waterproof */,
  "fogproof" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is fogproof */,
  "shockproof" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the product is shockproof */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used (if applicable) */,
  "tube_diameter" TEXT /* Diameter of the tube */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length x width x height) */,
  "warranty" TEXT /* Warranty period in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "customer_support_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for customer support */,
  "customer_support_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the customer last logged in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object storing customer preferences (e.g., preferred categories, notification settings) */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price after discount and tax */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was not helpful */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who added the product to the wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product added to the wishlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the wishlist */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the product in the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code for the discount */,
  "minimum_spend" REAL /* Minimum amount required to qualify for the promotion */,
  "maximum_discount" REAL /* Maximum discount amount */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the supplier was founded */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product supplied */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "supply_price" REAL /* Price at which the supplier provides the product */,
  "last_supply_date" TEXT /* Date the product was last supplied */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for supply (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
